_docs.overview: OWASP-recommended security headers for production. Vercel ignores unknown keys like this one.

csp_template_notes.default-src 'self': Baseline: only allow resources from same origin. Relax per use-case below.
csp_template_notes.script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline': WARNING: unsafe-inline may be needed for some Next.js setups and third-party scripts. For strict CSP, remove unsafe-inline and use nonce-based or hash-based CSP with Next.js <Script nonce> prop. See https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/configuring/content-security-policy
csp_template_notes.style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline': Tailwind CSS and many CSS-in-JS libs need unsafe-inline. If you use only CSS files, remove it.
csp_template_notes.img-src 'self' data: https:: Allows all HTTPS images. Narrow to your CDN domains for strictest policy, e.g. img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.example.com
csp_template_notes.font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.co: Google Fonts. Remove if self-hosting fonts. Add other font CDNs as needed.
csp_template_notes.connect-src 'self': API calls and fetch requests. Add your API domains, e.g. connect-src 'self' https://api.example.com
csp_template_notes.frame-ancestors 'none': Prevents clickjacking. Equivalent to X-Frame-Options DENY but CSP-level.
csp_template_notes.RELAXING_FOR_ANALYTICS: Add your analytics domain: script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://plausible.io; connect-src 'self' https://plausible.io
csp_template_notes.RELAXING_FOR_FONTS: Add font CDNs: font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net
csp_template_notes.RELAXING_FOR_STORYBOOK_EMBEDS: Allow framing from specific origins: frame-ancestors https://your-storybook.vercel.app; or for iframe embeds: frame-src https://your-storybook.vercel.app

verification.securityheaders.com: Deploy to Vercel, then submit your URL at https://securityheaders.com — aim for A or A+ rating
verification.Mozilla_Observatory: Run: npx observatory-cli <your-url> or visit https://observatory.mozilla.org — aim for A or higher
verification.devtools_check: Open DevTools → Network tab → click any document request → check Response Headers

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
